=== Concurrent Write Integrity Test ===
--- Building ---
   Compiling concurrent-writer v0.1.0 (/app)
    Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 0.42s
VERIFY: File integrity check passed
--- Checking segment assignment overlap ---
FAIL: Segment 12 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Segment 13 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Segment 8 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Segment 9 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Segment 4 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Segment 5 is assigned to multiple workers (overlapping write)
FAIL: Overlapping segment assignments detected — concurrent writes to same offsets
Worker assignments:
Writing 65536 bytes with 4 workers (16 segments of 4096 bytes)
Worker 3 completed: segments [12, 13, 14, 15]
Worker 2 completed: segments [8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13]
Worker 1 completed: segments [4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9]
Worker 0 completed: segments [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
All workers completed
FAIL: Data corruption from concurrent writes
